action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh at iteration 0 with no prior workspace, training curves, or eval scores. Analysis: A working end-to-end pipeline is required immediately per workflow (few epochs then submit_eval to baseline score + measure iteration time). Using a simple but functional FCN on pretrained ResNet-50 (25M params, listed as pre-downloaded) avoids loading issues; 512x512 crops match meta.json; remap labels per spec (0->255, 1-150->0-149); log metrics to required JSONL; predict.py batches at fixed resize for speed/original-size output with nearest-neighbor. This gives a quick baseline mIoU (expected low ~15-25 after 2 epochs) without OOM or network dependency. Decision: Write model/train/predict scripts, train 2 epochs, submit best checkpoint for eval to get first score and time data before iterating on architecture/augs/lr/epochs.
